ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Milch Schokolade 88% [Zucker, _Milchpulver_, Kakaobutter, Kakaobohne, Emulgatoren (Sonnenblumen Lecithin), Aroma (Vanillin), Kakao Trockenmasse 32%, _Milchtrockenmasse_25%], Pistazien 12%.
